title: Uruguayan Tuna Tartare
description: A refreshing Uruguayan-inspired tuna tartare, great as an appetizer or snack. The tangy and flaky texture will leave you wanting more!
instructions: Cut the tuna into small pieces and place them in a medium bowl.
Squeeze the lime juice over the tuna and toss to coat.
Drizzle the olive oil over the tuna and toss again to coat.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and minced red onion.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the tartare a good stir and serve immediately.
